pages.title: Skybrand Feather
pages.text: A remnant of descent, evasion, and violent landings. The Feather begins as fearlessness with height and ends as a way to weaponize the sky itself.

pages.title: Dormant and Latent
pages.text: $(l)Dormant$(): Completely negates fall damage and may nullify incoming projectiles. Wither and void remain especially dangerous.$(br2)$(l)Latent$(): Projectile negation becomes more reliable, airborne movement grows cleaner, and attacks made while off the ground become more punishing.

pages.title: Awakened, Ascended, Transcendent, Apex
pages.text: $(l)Awakened$(): The Feather grants controlled slow-falling and turns meaningful drops into plunging strikes that burst on landing.$(br2)$(l)Ascended$(): The landing burst grows stronger, and even some magical attacks can be shrugged away.$(br2)$(l)Transcendent$(): The bearer can launch upward to cleanse harmful effects and reclaim the air.$(br2)$(l)Apex$(): Projectiles fail almost completely, plunging strikes become brutal, and even airborne melee attacks may simply slide past the bearer.
